scene: A simple suggested driveway in soft muted gray-blue tones (a hint of a garage door and pavement) filling the whole tall vertical frame. The Owner, a round-headed stick everyman, stands proudly in the upper half holding up a car key, his shiny blue car parked below him filling the lower half. Composed tall, edge to edge, no empty space. Selective pop color: the blue car and the key. Crude doodle linework, bright and light.

A designed beat in a soft muted blue-grey car-interior setting (a hint of a car door and window) filling the whole tall vertical frame. One car seat stands large and central with little wavy warmth lines, a big closed red padlock clamped onto it and a coin slot bolted to its side. Composed tall and bold, edge to edge. Selective pop color: the red padlock. Subtle muted background, crude doodle linework.

A soft muted blue-grey car-interior background filling the whole tall vertical frame. A large tall cutaway cross-section of the car seat runs top to bottom, revealing the heating coils, wires, and a control button already built inside it, all present and connected. Composed tall, edge to edge. Selective pop color: the warm orange heating coils.

A soft muted icy-blue car-interior background filling the whole tall vertical frame. The Owner sits in the locked car seat shivering with chattering teeth, a big blue snowflake above his head, the red padlock still clamped on the seat. Composed tall to fill the frame top to bottom. Selective pop color: the icy blue snowflake and the red padlock.

A simple muted grey-blue car-interior background filling the whole tall vertical frame. The small green Trick gremlin with pointy ears and a sly grin stands tall beside the car seat holding out one open palm; a coin slot is bolted on the seat. Composed tall, edge to edge. Selective pop color: the green gremlin and bright green money.

A soft muted warm car-interior background filling the whole tall vertical frame. The Owner drops a green coin into the seat's coin slot and the seat finally glows warm with wavy orange heat lines, the red padlock popping open for the moment. Composed tall to fill the frame. Selective pop color: the warm orange glow and the green coin.

A soft muted warm-cream old-room background with faint cobwebs in the corners to signal long ago, filling the whole tall vertical frame. The green Trick gremlin grins slyly in the lower frame and gestures up toward an old glowing classic light bulb above him, hinting at a much older secret. Composed tall, edge to edge. Selective pop color: the warm bulb-yellow glow and the green gremlin.
